scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -k "cross-env PORT=3002 npm run dev --workspace @workspace/api-server" "cross-env PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev --workspace @workspace/sankhya-suporte"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run workspaces:build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run workspaces:typecheck
